name: fastly
title: Fastly
description: Access your Fastly account from Raycast
author: JonathanSpeek

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Fastly API Token
preferences.description: Your Fastly API token from https://manage.fastly.com/account/tokens

commands.name: index
commands.title: Manage Services
commands.description: View and manage your Fastly services

commands.name: invite
commands.title: Invite Team Member
commands.description: Invite a new member to your Fastly team

commands.name: kv-stores
commands.title: Manage KV Stores
commands.description: Browse and manage Fastly KV Store key-value pairs

commands.name: secret-stores
commands.title: Manage Secret Stores
commands.description: View and manage Fastly Secret Store secrets

commands.name: config-stores
commands.title: Manage Config Stores
commands.description: View and manage Fastly Config Store key-value pairs

commands.name: acls
commands.title: Manage ACLs
commands.description: View and manage Fastly Access Control Lists and IP entries

commands.name: audit-log
commands.title: View Audit Log
commands.description: View and filter Fastly audit log events for security monitoring and compliance

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
